Grab a Solana .sol domain name for $1

Solana domain names are like website domains in that they resolve a human-friendly name to your long, complex Solana wallet address. They're quite pricy but I've launched a subdomain registrar so you can get yours for around one Dollar.

03 Dec 2024

What is Bitcoin dominance?

Bitcoin dominance is simply the percentage of Bitcoin compared to the total value of the entire cryptocurrency market. In other words, it shows how much of the market’s total value is held by Bitcoin.
